title: Prototype: Pain
description: Overhaul of minecraft damage system adding bleeding,fractures,infection and many more.
body:
Prototype: Pain

A total rework of Minecrafts health and damage system

🩸 What is Prototype: Pain?

Prototype: pain replaces Minecraft's simple heart-based health with localized limb damage system. Instead of losing hearts, players must deal with bleeding, fractures, dislocations, pain and infection

This mod aims to create a harder, gritty survival experience where every injury matters

⚙️Core Features
Localized Damage
Bleeding & Trauma
Pain & Contiousness Mechanic
Healing System
Mutiplayer Medical Support
⚠️ Development Status
🚧 Early Development Warning 🚧
Expect bugs, missing features, and mod conflicts.
Feedback is welcome to shape the mod’s future!

This mod is heavily inspired by another mod "First Aid" and a game "Casualties: Unknown", more commonly known as "scav prototype"
